items.title: [负面] This game only provides AI-generated translations ...
items.summary:
This game only provides AI-generated translations for non-CN languages, which is extremely disappointing. Proper human-made localization and translation are an extremely essential part of the game experience for a game with such a focus on story, and replacing them with an AI-generated mess is unacceptable.

At the moment the developers are in the process of updating their translations, but they are only adding human proofreading on top of the AI-generated translations. Please hire an actual human localization and translation team, and show this game the love and care that it deserves.

items.title: [正面] Actually a very good and fun game. If you like Lim...
items.summary: Actually a very good and fun game. If you like Limbus Company 99% you would love this.

items.title: [负面] It's a very F2P gacha game, rewards are tremendous...
items.summary:
It's a very F2P gacha game, rewards are tremendously generous compared to many gacha games. Gameplay is pretty solid and the visuals and effects are decent. The game is relatively balanced and characters don't get power crept.

The story however is hard to enjoy. Not that the story isn't interesting, but it stopped being engaging after chapter 2. I really enjoyed the 1st and 2nd chapter, but 3rd chapter onwards it got really long and tiring. This was partly due to the fact that there is no voice acting in the story. It felt like reading a visual novel and overtime it gets really tiring. 

The story also does not match the gameplay at all, you could be confronting a group of bandits and the fights would involve some black monsters instead. While this is an exception to boss fights, it just isn't immersive. It's also the fact that you will encounter the same enemies (most of them being extremely weak and predictable) throughout the story, the campaign part of the game just feels boring to play overall.

What really killed the immersion of the story is the dialogue scenes. The dialogue box could only fit 2 lines of characters at a time, so words will often spill out to the 2nd page. This problem is even more annoying is when you enable the autoplay feature. For starters, the autoplay feature will not pause for you to read. After displaying the last word, it will immediately skip to the next dialogue. Not to mention, if a dialogue exceeds the 2 lines limit, it will immediately flip to the next page instead of continuing the sentence downwards. 

Overall the game is alright considering it's f2p and does not feel like a low quality game. But I just can't recommend anybody this game due to the way the story is being conveyed. The story isn't the problem, rather it's the immersion of the story. 

5/10

items.summary:
this game is fun to be honest

but in the end it is a gacha so it will cost you some (a lot) of money

this is a difficult game and require many character and weapon dupes to clear

but it is a fun game regardless
